name: agentforge
description: Adaptive Agent Team Builder for Claude Code

commands.name: forge
commands.description: Create a new agent team from a task description

commands.name: genesis
commands.description: Start from an idea and build an optimized agent team

commands.name: reforge
commands.description: Rebuild or reconfigure an existing agent team

commands.name: team
commands.description: View and manage the current agent team

commands.name: ask
commands.description: Ask a question to a specific agent on the team

commands.name: delegate
commands.description: Delegate a subtask to an agent on the team

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show the current status of all agents and tasks

commands.name: cost-report
commands.description: Display token usage and cost breakdown
